string 2: This city where Inori was born and raised...
I do not wish to harm it more. Let us go elsewhere.

I have created this space by using the collision of
opposing forces—the sun and the moon.

I will give it my all to keep Chronomon trapped in this space.
In the mean time... I'm counting on you. Finish this.

Stay vigilant, Jupitermon. Both you and Chronomon
possess the ability to manipulate time.

If two such powers were to clash, it would bring upon severe
distortions! And we have no idea what that would bring about!

The space we created was transformed by space-time
distortions.

And I believe that human lying over there is also
somehow related to all of this.
Inori! I'm so glad you're okay! *sob*
I was falling into a hole and couldn't grab your hand.
After that, it felt like I was dreaming for quite a while.

Could it be... we pulled out that whole, entire moment...? 
The moment you disappeared...?

In order to save her... it would seem he forced an
expansion of the space-time disturbance.

How do I say this...? I think he interfered with...
the "laws of time."

Look at this place... Do you think we can still return to
the previous world from here?

We don't even know if the previous world even exists
anymore... Or even the Digital World, for that matter...
That's what happens when space-time is distorted...
Maybe if us two, who have the power of time, fight...
...the world inevitably turns out like this.
This is exactly what Chronomon was hoping for.
I'll do something about all of this in the end.

I thought I saw something burst out when we pulled
Inori in before. This must be what it was.
It's so warm... I can hear Inori's voice...

Inori's memories... What she felt when she was trapped...
They're flowing into me...
This must be all the times she called out to me...

All those feelings she had... took on a physical form...?
Is that what happens when time and space warp...?

I can feel it... Chronomon is right over there. That means
the Akashic Records must be just beyond...
